Labs","details":"Library code under DELEGATECALL reads its OWN (empty) immutables, so it      cannot see `Staking`'s `_chainConfigContract` / `_stakingToken` /      `_systemRewardContract` \u2014 those dependencies are threaded in as the      `cfg` / `token` / `sysReward` parameters. Errors live in      `IStakingContextErrors`; events are emitted via `IStakingEvents`. The      shared snapshot helper lives in `StakingLayout` (single source).","errors":{"AddressEmptyCode(address)":[{"details":"There's no code at `target` (it is not a contract)."}],"AddressInsufficientBalance(address)":[{"details":"The ETH balance of the account is not enough to perform the operation."}],"AmountTooLow(uint256)":[{"params":{"amount":"The amount that is too low."}}],"FailedInnerCall()":[{"details":"A call to an address target failed. The target may have reverted."}],"OwnerSelfStakeBelowMinimum()":[{"details":"Thrown when a validator owner would reduce self-stake below the configured minimum while other delegators remain."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC20 token failed."}],"ValidatorNotFound(address)":[{"params":{"validator":"The validator that is not found."}}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"Staking economics extraction library","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"AmountTooLow(uint256)":[{"notice":"Thrown when the amount is too low."}],"DelegationQueueEmpty()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the delegation queue is empty."}],"InsufficientBalance()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the balance is insufficient."}],"InvalidClaimEpoch()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the claim epoch is invalid."}],"NotEnoughBalance()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the balance is not enough."}],"ValidatorNotFound(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when the validator is not found."}]},"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Delegation + reward/fee accounting + claims relocated out of `Staking`         to keep its runtime bytecode under the EIP-170 24 KB limit. Reached by         DELEGATECALL from `Staking`'s thin forwarders, so it shares the proxy's         `msg.sender`, `address(this)`, and ERC-7201 storage.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/staking/StakingEconomics.sol":"StakingEconomics"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":80},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/",":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":ds-test/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":openzeppelin-foundry-upgrades/=lib/openzeppelin-foundry-upgrades/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contracts/staking/StakingEconomics.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe940d5b868ac54ce2f8e469b079477d5795085b5de559bcc717939f1c48bef19","license":"GPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://7f8d9aaa1366ed6d1234842c51355a6eef7aaa7fd536c36820156eb3c0eb3ffc","dweb:/ipfs/QmevN94ScUk2MH5H9gASsErBc4wAYNdiHXXmcqjzVw2jJE"]},"contracts/staking/StakingLayout.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7a7b34f92d829b44935f2f552cee25655c2b0b9d4454621ea117438d7858d9a1","license":"GPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://d6842566cc0df7bd394a8643d39aff061f677ea70b8c96787fb64d06eadfb720","dweb:/ipfs/QmZjku7urAs3WERERdCDfijn1x8LKNh4x55DP93tkyjCEc"]},"contracts/staking/interfaces/IChainConfig.sol":{"keccak256":"0x98b31faa2b0dc6d711c51945d798169ced978c8d77f081bbffe370612d11e000","license":"GPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://3836960857f325e30c8a503ebde7cbea00b006565d85c6b4b4afde16029f12d6","dweb:/ipfs/QmNX1WMSCVqhTh2Jq2G2jJ2vHJwCBo1yK9DtTYXj8TWstp"]},"contracts/staking/interfaces/IStaking.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6374e8c3e7f7f7bf205e3f771fc845275ccc3ebdef8679e33afdc9bf3413e71a","license":"GPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://b383f452eecaddca2b982011e657f2899d630d96a80f5084cb5c8bf2727f0bcf","dweb:/ipfs/QmU663SJurtF31DcnEdbxybJ5ogBA2MHdTN9XNyiXPTBgf"]},"contracts/sta
